args.text: N=2; F=$(nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,memory.used --format=csv,noheader,nounits|awk -F', ' '$2<100{print $1}'|head -n$N|paste -sd,); [ -z "$F" ]&&echo 'No free GPU!'||{ C=$(echo $F|awk -F, '{print NF}'); echo "GPU:$F($C)"; CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=$F nohup mpirun -np $C ./a.out >log$(date +%Y%m%d) 2>&1 & }

N=4; F=$(nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,memory.used --format=csv,noheader,nounits|awk -F', ' '$2<100{print $1}'|head -n$N|paste -sd,); [ -z "$F" ]&&echo 'No free GPU!'||{ C=$(echo $F|awk -F, '{print NF}'); echo "GPU:$F($C)"; CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=$F nohup mpirun -np $C ./a.out >log$(date +%Y%m%d) 2>&1 & }

N=8; F=$(nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,memory.used --format=csv,noheader,nounits|awk -F', ' '$2<100{print $1}'|head -n$N|paste -sd,); [ -z "$F" ]&&echo 'No free GPU!'||{ C=$(echo $F|awk -F, '{print NF}'); echo "GPU:$F($C)"; CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=$F nohup mpirun -np $C ./a.out >log$(date +%Y%m%d) 2>&1 & }

nvcc main.cu -arch=sm_60 -I/home/chenpengchung/openmpi-3.0.3/include -L/home/chenpengchung/openmpi-3.0.3/lib -lmpi -o a.out && { N=4; F=$(nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,memory.used --format=csv,noheader,nounits|awk -F', ' '$2<100{print $1}'|head -n$N|paste -sd,); [ -z "$F" ]&&echo 'No free GPU!'||{ C=$(echo $F|awk -F, '{print NF}'); echo "GPU:$F($C)"; CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=$F nohup mpirun -np $C ./a.out >log$(date +%Y%m%d) 2>&1 & }; }

N=4; F=$(nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,memory.used --format=csv,noheader,nounits|awk -F', ' '$2<100{print $1}'|head -n$N|paste -sd,); [ -z "$F" ]&&echo 'No free GPU!'||{ C=$(echo $F|awk -F, '{print NF}'); echo "GPU:$F($C)"; CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=$F nohup /opt/openmpi-3.1.4/bin/mpirun -np $C ./a.out >log$(date +%Y%m%d) 2>&1 & }

N=8; F=$(nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,memory.used --format=csv,noheader,nounits|awk -F', ' '$2<100{print $1}'|head -n$N|paste -sd,); [ -z "$F" ]&&echo 'No free GPU!'||{ C=$(echo $F|awk -F, '{print NF}'); echo "GPU:$F($C)"; CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=$F nohup /opt/openmpi-3.1.4/bin/mpirun -np $C ./a.out >log$(date +%Y%m%d) 2>&1 & }
ps aux | grep a.out | grep -v grep; echo '---'; tail -1 Ustar_Force_record.dat 2>/dev/null
ps aux | grep a.out | grep -v grep

N=4; F=$(nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,memory.used --format=csv,noheader,nounits|awk -F', ' '$2<100{print $1}'|head -n$N|paste -sd,); [ -z "$F" ]&&echo 'No free GPU!'||{ C=$(echo $F|awk -F, '{print NF}'); echo "GPU:$F($C)"; CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=$F nohup mpirun -np $C ./a.out >log$(date +%Y%m%d) 2>&1 & }

cd ~/Edit2_GILBM_auto && nohup python3 -u grid_convergence/run_grid_convergence.py > grid_convergence/pipeline_log_$(date +%Y%m%d).txt 2>&1 & sleep 1 && tail -f grid_convergence/pipeline_log_$(date +%Y%m%d).txt

BUSY=$(nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,memory.used --format=csv,noheader,nounits|awk -F', ' '($1>=4&&$1<=7)&&$2>100{print $1}'|paste -sd,); [ -n "$BUSY" ]&&echo '⚠ NVLink GPU 4-7 busy: '$BUSY||{ echo '🟢 NVLink-Safe GPU:4,5,6,7 (避開GPU0)'; CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=4,5,6,7 nohup mpirun -np 4 ./a.out >log$(date +%Y%m%d) 2>&1 & }
